data.body: FM-3 (test_pydantic_review_code) + FM-4 (test_pydantic_text_mode): CONFIRMED already fixed on HEAD by commit 24cdb4c40 (2026-07-09 'update 3 external live tests stale after post-06-16 design changes'). All FM-3/FM-4 failing runs tested pre-fix trees (run 29064746427's headSha 6c85698bf predates the fix). Ran both LIVE on HEAD with REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL=1 + live Anthropic model -> 2 passed in 131s. No fix needed. d9aa pushed as Gerrit #670, awaiting Verified.
